title: Enterprise UI/UX Design Principles
subtitle: Design guidance for building professional enterprise applications

principles.title: Clarity Over Creativity
principles.description: Enterprise apps prioritize clarity and efficiency. Users need to accomplish tasks quickly, not be impressed by clever design.
guidance: Use familiar patterns over novel ones
Labels should be descriptive, not witty
Icons should be unambiguous - when in doubt, add text labels

principles.title: Density and Space
principles.description: Enterprise users often work with data-dense interfaces. Balance information density with visual breathing room.
guidance: Data tables can be dense - prioritize scannability
Use whitespace strategically to create visual groupings
Forms can be compact but must maintain readability
Avoid excessive padding that pushes content below the fold

principles.title: Consistent and Predictable
principles.description: Users develop muscle memory. Consistent interfaces reduce cognitive load and errors.
guidance: Place similar actions in the same location
Use consistent naming across the application
Follow platform conventions for interaction patterns
Error messages should appear in predictable locations

principles.title: Progressive Disclosure
principles.description: Show users what they need, when they need it. Don't overwhelm with options upfront.
guidance: Start with defaults that work for most users
Use accordions or tabs for advanced options
